title: Siu Bao with Lentil Filling
description: A twist on traditional Chinese bao with a hearty lentil filling, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Combine xenial lentils and 2 cups of water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 20 minutes.
In a pan, heat the molten oil over medium heat. Add the finely chopped chinese char and cook until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked lentils, chinese char, siu bao dough, chinese soy sauce, and chinese five spice powder. Mix well.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal portions, depending on desired size.
Roll out each portion into a thin circle, then place a tablespoon of the lentil filling in the center.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a bun, and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat, and cook the buns for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
